Uses of Interface
net.dapete.exceptional.function.ExBinaryOperator

Packages that use ExBinaryOperator
Package
Description
net.dapete.exceptional.stream
This package provides utilities for handling checked exceptions in Streams.

  • Uses of ExBinaryOperator in net.dapete.exceptional.stream

    Methods in net.dapete.exceptional.stream with parameters of type ExBinaryOperator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<T>
    ExStream.exReduce(ExBinaryOperator<T,?> accumulator)
    Equivalent of Stream.reduce(BinaryOperator).
    T
    ExStream.exReduce(T identity, ExBinaryOperator<T,?> accumulator)
    Equivalent of Stream.reduce(Object, BinaryOperator).
    <U> U
    ExStream.exReduce(U identity, ExBiFunction<U, ? super T, U, ?> accumulator, ExBinaryOperator<U,?> combiner)
    Equivalent of Stream.reduce(Object, BiFunction, BinaryOperator).
